title: elodes glandulosum
intro: Elodes glandulosum, also known as Sticky Elodea or Sticky Water-willow, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Haloragaceae. It is primarily found in freshwater environments, particularly in North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other compounds. The health benefits of Elodes glandulosum include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and promoting the healing process, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
